title: US Oncology Network
problem: Independent oncology practices struggle with economies of scale, access to resources, and negotiating power with payers.
solution: Network model providing independent oncology practices with shared services, group purchasing, and clinical programs.
technology: Network coordination platform, shared services infrastructure, practice management tools
varden_fit: HIGH - Network model and practice coordination align with platform strategy. Model for specialty practice aggregation.
notes: Practice network model. Interesting analog for Varden's specialty coordination approach.
